[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Brannij]] commanded the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II-class'' class Star Destroyer]] [[Bastion (Imperial II-class)|''Bastion'']].
During the [[Battle of Kathol System]], Brannij arrived to protect [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol]] from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] attack, led by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] commander [[Kursk Mal'ia]].

However, when the battle began to turn against the Imperial forces, and Brannij realized that the commanding [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], [[Kentor Sarne]], had no interest in saving anyone but himself, Brannij created a diversion and took the ''Bastion'' and the remaining Imperial ships and fled into hyperspace.
